title: Day 5 Lesson 4 ( Video )What time you woke up
html:
Day 5 - Lesson 4 (the dialogue is the continuation of Lesson 3)

なんじに　おきました = What time you woke up

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ　= Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters):  がくせい　ふたり (two students)

The only new word for this lesson is:

けさ (kesa) = this morning

おきました (okimashita) = woke up
